name: github-pr-reviewer
title: GitHub PR Reviewer
description: Enhanced GitHub PR review management with team requests, filtering, and quick actions

commands.name: review-requests
commands.title: Review Requests
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: View all PRs awaiting your review including team requests

commands.name: my-pull-requests
commands.title: My Pull Requests
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: View and manage your own pull requests

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: PR Reviewer Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: Quick access to review requests from the menu bar

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: GitHub token with 'repo' scope (required). Add 'read:org' scope for team review requests.

preferences.name: includeTeams
preferences.title: Include Team Review Requests
preferences.description: Show PRs where your teams are requested (requires 'read:org' scope on token)

preferences.name: defaultFilter
preferences.title: Default Filter
preferences.description: Default filter to apply when opening the extension

preferences.name: organizations
preferences.title: Organizations
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of organizations to filter by (leave empty for all)

preferences.name: excludedRepos
preferences.title: Excluded Repositories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of repositories to exclude (format: owner/repo)

preferences.name: showRepository
preferences.title: Show Repository Name
preferences.description: Display the repository name in the PR list

preferences.name: showLastUpdated
preferences.title: Show Last Updated
preferences.description: Display when the PR was last updated

preferences.name: showLineDiff
preferences.title: Show Line Diff
preferences.description: Display the number of lines added/removed

preferences.name: showApprovals
preferences.title: Show Approval Count
preferences.description: Display the number of approvals (requires additional API calls)
